ufoSighting.description: Observed a bright, metallic disc-shaped object hovering approximately 1000 feet above ground level. The object remained stationary for about 5 minutes before rapidly ascending and disappearing into the clouds. No sound was detected during the observation.

witnessDetails.name: John Smith
witnessDetails.statement: I was walking my dog when I noticed an unusual light in the sky. At first, I thought it was a plane, but it was completely silent and moving in ways that no aircraft I've seen could move.

witnessDetails.name: Jane Doe
witnessDetails.statement: I was in my backyard when I saw the object. It was definitely not a drone or any conventional aircraft I'm familiar with. The way it moved was unlike anything I've ever seen.

characteristics.speed: Unknown, but extremely fast when it departed
characteristics.altitude: Initially at 1000 feet, then rapidly ascended
